summary: P1 Integration testing completed successfully. All 6 test features verified: Profile page tabs (Minted/Posts), minted photos gallery with UnifiedPhotoCard, Card View toggle, Face Match button on has_face=true photo, full-stats endpoint, and SelfieMatchModal opening. All 7 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Profile page has 'Minted (7)' and 'Posts (0)' tabs with data-testid attributes
VERIFIED: Profile minted gallery shows 7 UnifiedPhotoCard components
VERIFIED: MintedPhotos page Card View toggle works (button with title='Card View (Flip for Stats)')
VERIFIED: UnifiedPhotoCard flip animation works - shows stats on back including Authenticity section
VERIFIED: Face Match button appears on card back for photo mint_test_a1d75b2038d747fe (has_face=true, selfie_match_completed=false)
VERIFIED: Clicking Face Match button opens SelfieMatchModal with 'Selfie Verification' title
VERIFIED: SelfieMatchModal shows 'Earn up to +5% Authenticity Bonus', attempts counter, and cost
VERIFIED: /api/minting/photos endpoint includes has_face, selfie_match_completed, selfie_match_score fields
VERIFIED: /api/minting/photo/{mint_id}/full-stats returns all 21+ required fields for UnifiedPhotoCard
NOTE: WebGL warning in browser is expected (face-api.js) - does not affect functionality
NOTE: 'No camera found on this device' in SelfieMatchModal is expected in headless browser testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test photo mint_test_a1d75b2038d747fe with has_face=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Face Match integration fully verified. Test photo mint_test_a1d75b2038d747fe has has_face=true and selfie_match_completed=false, making it eligible for Face Match. The Face Match button appears on the BACK of the UnifiedPhotoCard after flipping (click 'Tap to flip'). SelfieMatchModal requires camera access which won't work in headless browser. All minted photos list endpoint now includes face detection fields.

unified_photo_card_flip.front: Clean image with dollar value, level, scenery badge, stamina
unified_photo_card_flip.back: Total Power, Level/XP, Authenticity section, Face Match button

mocked_apis_list: Facebook Graph API for engagement reactions
